title: Moral tension
subtitle: Discuss competing goods, not simple good versus bad.
overview: High-level ethical arguments often compare two legitimate values.

Module: Advanced Argument and Originality. C1 Hi turns advanced English into controlled independent performance through argument, interaction, source work, writing, professional output, and native-style ideas.

sections.title: C1 Hi focus
rows: High-level ethical arguments often compare two legitimate values.
高阶伦理论证常比较两个合理价值。
The stronger move is not to sound complicated, but to make the structure of the problem visible.
更强的动作不是听起来复杂，而是把问题结构呈现出来。
The tension is between protecting individual freedom and preventing harm that individuals cannot easily see.
张力在于保护个人自由和防止个人不容易看见的伤害之间。
Describe a conflict between two values that both matter.
描述两个都重要的价值之间的冲突。

items.en: High-level ethical arguments often compare two legitimate values.
items.zh: 高阶伦理论证常比较两个合理价值。

items.en: The stronger move is not to sound complicated, but to make the structure of the problem visible.
items.zh: 更强的动作不是听起来复杂，而是把问题结构呈现出来。

items.en: The tension is between protecting individual freedom and preventing harm that individuals cannot easily see.
items.zh: 张力在于保护个人自由和防止个人不容易看见的伤害之间。

items.en: Native-style move: High-level ethical arguments often compare two legitimate values.
items.zh: Native-style 动作：高阶伦理论证常比较两个合理价值。

items.en: At C1 Hi, I should be able to develop the idea without waiting for a perfect script.
items.zh: 到了 C1 Hi，我应该能在没有完美稿子的情况下展开想法。

items.en: I will make the argument precise, but I will keep the sentence readable and speakable.
items.zh: 我会让论证精确，但仍保持句子可读、可朗读。

items.en: The goal is controlled independence: I can choose, adjust, and defend my language in real time.
items.zh: 目标是有控制的独立：我能实时选择、调整并维护自己的语言。

items.en: If my answer sounds fluent but shallow, I will add structure, evidence, or a sharper distinction.
items.zh: 如果我的回答听起来流利但浅，我会加入结构、证据或更清楚的区别。

items.en: The tension is between protecting individual freedom and preventing harm that individuals cannot easily see.
items.zh: 张力在于保护个人自由和防止个人不容易看见的伤害之间。

items.en: Notice how the sentence carries judgment without sounding exaggerated.
items.zh: 注意这个句子如何表达判断，同时不显得夸张。

items.en: Shadow it once for rhythm, then reuse the pattern with a new topic.
items.zh: 先跟读一次练节奏，再用新话题复用这个模式。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Describe a conflict between two values that both matter.
lines.zh: 描述两个都重要的价值之间的冲突。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The tension is between protecting individual freedom and preventing harm that individuals cannot easily see.
lines.zh: 张力在于保护个人自由和防止个人不容易看见的伤害之间。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you push that toward a stronger high-C1 answer?
lines.zh: 你能把它推进成更强的高 C1 回答吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will add a sharper distinction, a fair limitation, and a final sentence that shows judgment.
lines.zh: 可以。我会加入更清楚的区别、一个公平的局限，以及一个体现判断力的结尾句。

items.en: Describe a conflict between two values that both matter.
items.zh: 描述两个都重要的价值之间的冲突。

items.en: Speak once for three to five minutes, then mark the sentence where your reasoning becomes strongest.
items.zh: 说三到五分钟，然后标出推理最强的那个句子。

items.en: Rewrite that strong sentence into two versions: one more formal, one more conversational.
items.zh: 把那个强句改写成两个版本：一个更正式，一个更口语。

items.en: Add one native-style phrase from real input or from this lesson, and make it your own.
items.zh: 加入一个来自真实输入或本课的 native-style 短语，并把它变成你自己的表达。

items.en: Keep the final answer as evidence that you can perform at high C1, not just study high C1.
items.zh: 保留最终回答，作为你能实际表现高 C1，而不只是学习高 C1 的证据。
